heading: Step 4: Add PrivateLink Acess.
body:
Follow the procedure provided in the [Confluent documentation](https://docs.confluent.io/cloud/current/networking/private-links/azure-privatelink.html#add-a-private-link-access-in-ccloud)
to add PrivateLink access.

> **Note:** You need to provide your `azureSubscriptionId`.
